trades.rationale: Q1 record revenue + defense contract wins; Citizens PT $95, Clear Street PT $98; stock up 7.9% on earnings day with further analyst upgrades; web-quoted $85 but filled at $99.03 due to price movement

RKLB up 7.24% from entry ($99.03 -> $106.20, unrealized +$839); thesis validated by Needham and TD Cowen both raising PTs to $120 (from $90) on May 8-11. Airlines down on fuel costs; energy names (OXY, XOM, CVX) benefiting but CPI Tuesday prevents new entries. OXY ~$53 identified as next candidate post-CPI. DDOG on watchlist for pullback to $185-190.

trades.rationale: Thesis broken: down 6.14% from entry, 5% trailing stop exceeded. Korea semiconductor shockwave + hot CPI drove 10-14% crash on May 12. Nvidia competition structural threat to Windows processor business. Negative earnings growth ahead at 20x forward earnings — overvalued after 64% prior run-up.

Financials sector entry. Visa: 53% margins, 17% YoY growth, $40B revenue, 4.9B credentials, inflation-resilient payment volumes. Strong Buy consensus, avg PT $387.25 (19.6% upside). API limitation: trailing stop FAILED — no stop-loss protection on this position.
